popularStory.description: One of the lands William was given was Hatfield Peverel. Hatfield Peverel was the home of Agnes Waterhouse, the first woman to be executed for witchcraft in England. Known locally as Mother Waterhouse …

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Peverel was born about 1050, his father, Ranulph De Peverel, was 32 and his mother, Maud de Ingelrica, was 19. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Adeline. He died on 17 April 1113, in Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Caen, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Peverel est né environ 1050, son père, Ranulph De Peverel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud de Ingelrica, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Adeline. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1113, à Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Peverel um 1050 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph De Peverel 32 und seine Mutter Maud de Ingelrica 19. Er hatte mit Adeline mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. April 1113 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Adeline. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Peverelが約1050年に生まれた時，父Ranulph De Peverelは32歳，母Maud de Ingelricaは19歳であった。彼はAdelineとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1113年4月17日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタンダルド ヒルで64歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスケンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Peverel(이)가 대략 1050년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph De Peverel(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Ingelrica(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Adeline(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1113년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스탠더르드 힐에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 카이에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Adeline. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Peverel родился около 1050 г., его отцу по имени Ranulph De Peverel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Ingelrica, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Adeline. Он умер 17 апреля 1113 г. в местности стандард хилл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности каен, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.
